notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ Bridge for CentOS 7.9. It addresses 12 CVEs: CVE-2025-40240, CVE-2026-31402, CVE-2026-23243, CVE-2026-31607, CVE-2026-23455, and 7 more.
